flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Publication; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Principal Investigator has the right to publish. Reasonable patent stand-down (no more than 60 days from issuing the request). Students retain publication rights for thesis or academic publication, including commercially sensitive content. | Acceptable: Stand-down before publication acceptable provided ≤ 12 months. Student-produced commercially sensitive content may be embargoed for max 12 months. For Consulting Contracts only, removal of publications clause permitted by PI if (i) academic doesn't need results for research/publication, (ii) services not expected to generate new knowledge, (iii) no students relying on the research for thesis. | Escalation: Senior Manager, Research Grants and Contracts. Embargo > 12 months → School of Graduate Studies.
